person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com

Renaud I de Nevers, comte de Nevers
Also Known As:	"Renaud I Count of Nevers", "Count De Nevers", "Renaud I", "Count of Auxerre and Nevers"
Birthdate:	estimated between 983 and 1009 
Death:	May 29, 1040
Sainte-Vertu, Burgundy, France (killed in battle)
Place of Burial:	Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, France
Immediate Family:	
Son of Landéric IV, comte de Nevers and Mathilde de Nevers, dame de Limais
Husband of Hedwige de France, comtesse d'Auxerre

Father of 
Guillaume I, comte de Nevers; 
Robert de Nevers, seigneur de Crâon et de Sablé;
 Henri de Nevers; Guy de Nevers and 
Adelaide de Nevers

Brother of 
Eudes, comte de Nevers, VII. comte de Vendôme; 
Béatrix de Craon and
 Boson de Nevers


Occupation:	Comte de Nevers et Auxerre, Conde de Nevers e d'Auxerre, @occu00028@, Comte, de Nevers, d'Auxerre, Count of Nevers, Count of Nevers (1000-1040), Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre

Renaud I of Nevers, born in 1000 and died in 1040, Count of Nevers (1028-1040) and Auxerre (1031-1040), son of Landry, count of Nevers and Mathilde Burgundy -Comté, comtesse de Nevers, daughter of Otte-Guillaume, count of Burgundy and Mâcon. 

He was the ruling count of Nevers from 1028 until his death at the battle of Seignelay against Robert I, Duke of Burgundy.

He married in 1028 Alix de France (1003-ap.1063), daughter of Robert II, King of France, and Constance d'Arles, who brought him as a dowry the county of Auxerre. They had:

«b»Family

Children«/b»
1.) William I of Nevers (1029 † 1083)

2.) Henry of Nevers (died 1067)

3.) Guy of Nevers († 1084)

4.) Robert of Nevers Baron of Craon (c. 1035-1098)

5.) Adelaide of Nevers

zh.lifeSummary: 當Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre於1000年出生在法國布格尼艾福內維斯時，他的父親Landry DE NEVERS30歲，母親Mathilde de Bourgogne26歲。他於大約1019年與Lady Renauld I結婚。他去世於1040年5月29日在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉瑟利聶利享年40歲，埋葬在法國布格奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Renauld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Jacques, Jean-Yves, Lucien, Marcel, Mireille, Pascal.

en.lifeSummary: When Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre was born in 1000, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, his father, Landry DE NEVERS, was 30 and his mother, Mathilde de Bourgogne, was 26. He married Lady Renauld I about 1019. He died on 29 May 1040, in Séligney, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 40, and was buried in Auxerre, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre est né en 1000, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Landry DE NEVERS, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Bourgogne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Renauld I environ 1019. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1040, à Séligney, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Auxerre, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre 1000 in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Landry DE NEVERS 30 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Bourgogne 26. Er hat um 1019 Lady Renauld I geheiratet. Er starb am 29. Mai 1040 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Séligney, Jura, Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Auxerre, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre è nato il nel 1000 nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Landry DE NEVERS, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Bourgogne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Renauld I circa 1019. Morì il 29 maggio 1040, nel Séligney, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Auxerre, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerreが1000年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで生まれた時，父Landry DE NEVERSは30歳，母Mathilde de Bourgogneは26歳であった。約1019年にLady Renauld Iと結婚した。彼は1040年5月29日にフランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラスeリグニーで40歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンアウクセアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre(이)가 1000년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Landry DE NEVERS(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Bourgogne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1019년 Lady Renauld I(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1040년 5월 29일 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 스e리그니에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 오세르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre nasceu em 1000, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Landry DE NEVERS, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Bourgogne, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Renauld I aproximadamente 1019. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1040, em Séligney, Jura, Franche-Comté, França, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Auxerre, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre родился в 1000 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Landry DE NEVERS было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Bourgogne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Renauld I около 1019 г. Он умер 29 мая 1040 г. в местности сeлигни, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности ауксирр, бургогн, Франция.
